---
title: "Section 7: Page Design Showcase"
id: "mod001-se01-sec07"
section_id: "mod001-se01-sec07"
session_id: "mod001-se01"
toc: false
---




### In this section
<br>

- [Worked Example](mod001-se01-sec07-sp03.qmd)

```{=html}
<div class="custom-page-navigation">
    <div class="nav-prev">
        
        <a href="../06-computational-and-analytical-learning/mod001-se01-sec06-sp06.qmd">
            <span class="nav-label">← Previous</span>
            <span class="nav-title">Text Variant (Math)</span>
        </a>
        
    </div>
    <div class="nav-next">
        
        <a href="mod001-se01-sec07-sp03.qmd">
            <span class="nav-label">Next →</span>
            <span class="nav-title">Worked Example</span>
        </a>
        
    </div>
</div>
```

<!-- END_NAVIGATION -->
